welcome.default: 👋 Welcome! Tap a button below to get started.
welcome.short: 👋 Welcome to TravelMate! Tap a button to get started.
welcome.medium:
👋 Welcome to TravelMate — your travel companion for eSIMs, recharges, and tips.

Tap a button below to get started.
welcome.long:
👋 Welcome to TravelMate!

I help you stay connected while traveling:
• Buy eSIMs for instant data
• Recharge mobile numbers worldwide
• Get AI-powered travel tips

Tap a button below to get started.

help.default:
ℹ️ Tap /start to open the menu, then pick what you want from the buttons.

Everything in this bot is reachable by tapping — you don't need to remember any commands.
help.short: Tap /start to open the menu, then pick a button.
help.long:
ℹ️ How to use TravelMate

Tap /start to open the main menu, then choose what you need:
• Buy an eSIM for your trip
• Recharge a mobile number
• Ask the AI travel assistant
• Check your wallet & orders

Everything is a tap away — no commands to remember.

purchase.qrInstallSteps:
1. Open Settings → Cellular → Add eSIM
2. Scan the QR code from your email
3. Follow the on-screen prompts
purchase.qrTroubleshooting: Having trouble? Make sure you're on Wi-Fi and your device supports eSIM. Most phones from 2020+ work.
purchase.cancel: No worries — your order was cancelled. Tap a button below to do something else.

aiAssistant.intro:
What can I help you with?

Pick a topic below, or just type your travel question.
aiAssistant.introShort: Pick a topic or type your question.
aiAssistant.topicPrompt: Pick a topic below for quick answers:
aiAssistant.topicNotFound: I don't have info on that yet. Try another topic or type your question.
aiAssistant.noMatch:
Thanks for your question! I'm best with travel topics like visas, safety, food, transport, and budget tips.

Pick a topic below for quick answers, or rephrase your question.
aiAssistant.tipVisa: Most Southeast Asian countries offer visa-on-arrival or visa-free entry for 30–90 days. Check your passport's expiry — many countries require 6 months validity. Always verify requirements for your specific nationality before traveling.
aiAssistant.tipCurrency: ATMs are widely available in tourist areas. Withdraw local currency for the best rates — avoid airport exchange counters (they charge 5–10% more). In Japan, 7-Eleven ATMs accept foreign cards.
aiAssistant.tipSafety: Keep digital copies of your passport and visa in a secure cloud folder. Use a money belt in crowded areas. Save your embassy's local phone number. Most tourist areas are very safe, but stay aware of your surroundings.
aiAssistant.tipFood: Street food is safe in most Asian countries — look for stalls with high turnover and long local queues. In Thailand and Vietnam, some of the best meals cost under $2.
aiAssistant.tipTransport: Download offline maps (Google Maps or Maps.me) before you go. In Southeast Asia, grab a local SIM and use Grab for rides. Japan's rail pass is worth it if you're hopping between cities.
aiAssistant.tipPacking: Pack light — you can buy anything you need locally for cheap. Bring a universal power adapter, quick-dry towel, and a padlock for hostel lockers. Roll your clothes to save space.
aiAssistant.tipBudget: Daily budget for Southeast Asia: $25–50/day (hostel, food, transport). Europe: $50–100/day. Japan: $60–120/day. These include accommodation, meals, and local transport.
aiAssistant.tipConnectivity: Buy a local SIM at the airport for the best data rates. eSIMs are great for quick setup — you can buy one right here! Most cafés and restaurants have free Wi-Fi.
aiAssistant.tipHealth: Pack basic meds (painkillers, anti-diarrheal, band-aids). Check if you need vaccinations 6 weeks before travel. Travel insurance is essential — don't skip it.

errors.tooShort: That's too short — please try again.
errors.networkError: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again in a moment.
errors.rateLimited: Too many requests — please wait a moment and try again.
errors.sessionExpired: Your session expired. Tap /start to begin again.
errors.unknownCommand: Sorry, I didn't understand that. Try /help.
errors.paymentFailed: Payment didn't go through. Please try again or choose a different method.
errors.paymentFailedShort: Payment failed — try again or pick another method.

notifications.planExpiryWarning: ⏰ Your {provider} eSIM for {country} expires in {days} days. Tap here to renew before you lose connectivity.
notifications.lowDataAlert: 📶 You have {remaining} of data left on your {country} eSIM. Need more? Tap to top up.
notifications.specialOffer: 🎉 Special offer: Get {discount}% off your next eSIM purchase with code {code}.

privacy.trustNote: Your payment info is encrypted and never stored on our servers. We only use your email to deliver your eSIM QR code.
privacy.gdprConsent: We store only what's needed to deliver your order. You can request data deletion anytime by contacting support.
